reason: PRODUCT_GAP: OT filing UI does not exist for any role on production

diagnostic.summary: Self-service OT filing UI does not exist on production. Verified across 3 roles (crew, supervisor, hr) on /dashboard/hr/overtime and 3 alternate routes (/dashboard/hr/overtime/new, /dashboard/hr/overtime/apply, /dashboard/hr/attendance). For test.crew1, /dashboard/hr/overtime returns Access Restricted. For test.supervisor and test.hr, the page only shows approval controls (Approve/Reject/Clarify/Escalate) with NO File OT / New OT / Request OT / Apply OT button. Alternate routes return 404. Filing entrypoint does not exist.

actions: verified UI gap on /dashboard/hr/overtime as crew/supervisor/hr
all routes either 404 or contain no File/New/Request OT button
